Organisation: Central Bureau of Communication & Directorate of Publications Division
Eligible_Service: Officers under the Central/ State Governments
Essential_Qualification: Essential: (i) Diploma in Printing Technology from a recognized University /Institution or Degree of a recognized University or equivalent. (iii) Practical experience in different processes of printing, layout photography, art Work, costing and estimating etc. Desirable: Knowledge of Hindi.
Deputation_Period_Years: Initially for one year, extendable at the discretion of the appointing authority. Total deputation period, including any previous ex-cadre post, shall ordinarily not exceed 3 years. Maximum age limit for appointment by deputation is 56 years as on closing date of receipt of applications.
